events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need decide pass/fail. Scenario: clearance to wall/other units below manufacturer minimum. Work rough-complete. Industrial site. HVAC-R condenser/heat pump setting. Reference mfr install manual, IMC/IRC M1401. Clearance below mfr minimum is non-compliant. Decision must be fail if dangerous or non-compliant. Risk? Could be medium/high. Clearance affects airflow, overheating, efficiency, maybe fire? Not necessarily critical but non-compliant. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete maybe 70? value not asked, leave 0. sound_source etc default empty string/0. order empty. workable empty. findings: clearance to wall/other units below manufacturer minimum. actions: relocate/adjust unit to meet manufacturer minimum clearances; verify per mfr install manual and IMC/IRC M1401. rationale. references: mfr install manual, IMC/IRC M1401. Need ensure JSON valid.
